info.name: D&D Campaign Assistant API
info.description: All HTTP endpoints exposed by the project's own Node/Express backend (Backend/index.js). Excludes third-party calls (dnd5eapi.co) and Socket.io events, which aren't HTTP requests. Most routes require a Bearer access token obtained from Auth > Log In / Sign Up.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Signup, login, and JWT refresh. Access tokens are short-lived (15m) and returned in the JSON body; refresh tokens are httpOnly cookies (7d).

request.description: Create a new user account. Sets an httpOnly refreshToken cookie and returns a short-lived access token.

response.name: Validation error / email taken

request.description: Authenticate an existing user. Sets an httpOnly refreshToken cookie and returns a short-lived access token.
Exchanges the httpOnly refreshToken cookie (set during login/signup) for a new access token. Requires the cookie to be sent automatically by the browser/Postman cookie jar.

item.name: Campaigns
item.description: Campaign list, creation, joining, and membership management. All routes require Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}.

request.description: Returns every campaign the authenticated user participates in, with role, character name, and player count (relational join + aggregate subquery).
Looks up a campaign and its participants by join code (used when joining a session).
Returns every campaign/participant row in the system (relational join). Mainly used for debugging/admin purposes.
Generates a random 6-character join code guaranteed not to collide with an existing campaign.
Creates a new campaign with the caller as DM. Use a join code obtained from Generate Unique Join Code.
Joins an existing campaign by code and persists the full character sheet (computed client-side) to MongoDB plus the participant row in MySQL.
Returns every other participant of a campaign (joined with user info) excluding the caller — used to build the whisper-target list.
DM-only. Promotes another participant to DM and removes the caller from the campaign.

response.name: Not the DM

request.description: Removes the caller (and only the caller) from a campaign's participant list.
DM-only. Permanently deletes the campaign, all participants, and all character sheets (MySQL + MongoDB).

response.name: Not the DM

item.name: Character & Player
item.description: Reading a character sheet, toggling proficiencies, and shop checkout.

request.description: Returns the calling user's character sheet for a campaign, reshaped for the player-info/equipment UI.
Toggles a skill's proficiency for the calling user's character and recomputes its modifier server-side.
Toggles a saving throw's proficiency for the calling user's character and recomputes its modifier server-side.
Validates the cart against the DB-stored shop inventory (never trusts client-sent prices), deducts currency, and adds items to equipment.

item.name: Shop
item.description: DM-managed shop inventory and open/closed status.

request.description: DM view of the full shop document for a campaign, including all items.
DM-only. Replaces the full shop item list for a campaign (upserts the Shop document).
Player-facing view of the shop's item list (same data source as the DM view).
Returns just the boolean open/closed flag (used on page load before the live socket update arrives).

item.name: DM Assets & Monsters
item.description: Asset (token/map/audio) upload to S3 + MySQL metadata, and saved-monster bestiary.

request.description: Uploads an image/audio file to S3 and records its metadata in MySQL. Tokens are auto-cropped to a circle; maps are resized to fit 3000x3000.

response.name: Asset uploaded

request.description: Lists every asset uploaded for a campaign with a freshly-signed temporary S3 URL (4h expiry) per asset.
DM-only (verified server-side against the asset's own campaign). Deletes the S3 object and its MySQL row.

response.name: Not the DM of this campaign

request.description: Persists a monster (fetched from the D&D 5e API client-side) into the campaign's saved bestiary.

response.name: Missing data

request.description: Lists every monster the DM has saved for this campaign, newest first.

item.name: Live Session State
item.description: REST GETs used to hydrate a screen on load/refresh; live updates afterwards arrive over Socket.io (not represented in this HTTP collection).

request.description: Returns the last 50 chat messages visible to the caller (broadcasts + whispers they sent/received; the DM sees everything).
Returns every currently-active effect (e.g. spell durations) for the campaign.
Returns the persisted background image and token positions for the campaign's battle map.
Plain-text liveness check.
